en.extract:
The Bismarck fantail (Rhipidura dahli) is a fantail native to the islands New Britain and New Ireland. The binomial commemorates the German naturalist Friedrich Dahl.


Taxonomy
According to IOC there are 2  recognised subspecies. In alphabetical order, these are:

R. d. antonii Hartert, E, 1926
R. d. dahli Reichenow, 1897

The '''Bismarck fantail''' ('''''Rhipidura dahli''''') is a [[fantail]] native to the islands [[New Britain]] and [[New Ireland (island)|New Ireland]]. The binomial commemorates the German naturalist [[Friedrich Dahl]].

== Taxonomy ==
According to [[International Ornithologists' Union|IOC]] there are 2  recognised subspecies.<ref name=IOC>Gill F., Donsker D. & Rasmussen P. (Eds.): [https://www.worldbirdnames.org/bow/orioles/ Orioles, drongos, fantails]. ''[[International Ornithologists' Union|IOC]] World Bird List (v11.2)''. doi:10.14344/IOC.ML.11.2</ref> In alphabetical order, these are:

* ''R. d. antonii'' Hartert, E, 1926
* '''''R. d. dahli''''' Reichenow, 1897
